title: Develop and carry out diagnostic test strategies
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop and carry out diagnostic test strategies demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop diagnostic testing strategy

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Confirm existence of fault according to workplace procedures1.3 Identify systems and components to be tested1.4 Obtain and interpret information required to develop diagnostic testing strategy1.5 Develop testing strategy to identify cause of fault 1.6 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with diagnose and repair activity, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Confirm existence of fault according to workplace procedures1.3 Identify systems and components to be tested1.4 Obtain and interpret information required to develop diagnostic testing strategy1.5 Develop testing strategy to identify cause of fault 1.6 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with diagnose and repair activity, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Confirm existence of fault according to workplace procedures1.3 Identify systems and components to be tested1.4 Obtain and interpret information required to develop diagnostic testing strategy1.5 Develop testing strategy to identify cause of fault 1.6 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with diagnose and repair activity, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Develop diagnostic testing strategy

elements.title: Diagnose faults

pcs.text: Identify tools and equipment required for testing strategy and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures 2.2 Identify cause of fault through analysis of diagnostic test results.2.3 Confirm and report cause of fault according to workplace procedures2.4 Develop and report recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify tools and equipment required for testing strategy and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures 2.2 Identify cause of fault through analysis of diagnostic test results.2.3 Confirm and report cause of fault according to workplace procedures2.4 Develop and report recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify tools and equipment required for testing strategy and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures 2.2 Identify cause of fault through analysis of diagnostic test results.2.3 Confirm and report cause of fault according to workplace procedures2.4 Develop and report recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Diagnose faults

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
